title: Bitter Dense Peruvian Dates Stir-fry
description: A dense and bitter date-night dish featuring stuffed vegan buns with a saute of Peruvian dates. Perfect for those looking to indulge in something new and exciting.

ingredients.name: 20 Peruvian dates, pitted and quartered
ingredients.notes: Use the bitter variety for best results.

ingredients.name: 8 vegan buns or small bread rolls
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are dense in texture.

instructions: Mix cashews with a splash of water and seasonings to coat.
Place dates on baking sheet, then place them in the oven for about 12-15 minutes until they are almost caramelized.
While dates cook, stuff each bun with a tablespoon of cashew mixture and two quartered dates inside, pressing gently to secure.
Bake stuffed buns at 350°F (175°C) for about 10 minutes or until the buns are golden brown on top.
Serve hot as an appetizer or snack.
